Here is the list of zodiac signs and their corresponding scores on the $line (a measure of their compatibility in relationships):
1. Aries - 3/10 - Tends to dominate and be too intense
2. Taurus - 8/10 - Loyal but can be stubborn, good communication key
3. Gemini - 6/10 - Flirty and playful, but may not commit fully
4. Cancer - 9/10 - Emotional and caring, strong bond potential
5. Leo - 7/10 - Charismatic and passionate, but may get too proud
6. Virgo - 4/10 - Analytical and practical, but can be overly critical
7. Libra - 8/10 - Diplomatic and social, seeks balance in relationships
8. Scorpio - 5/10 - Passionate and intense, but may hold grudges
9. Sagittarius - 6/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, but may prioritize freedom
10. Capricorn - 3/10 - Responsible and ambitious, but can be too serious
11. Aquarius - 4/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but may be aloof
12. Pisces - 8/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, strong emotional connection
